channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics

item.title: Nebraska high court restores voting right for thousands of convicted felons
item.description: The court's unanimous decision restores the right to vote for residents with felony criminal records upon completion of their sentence, impacting thousands.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: McConnell privately slammed Trump as ‘stupid’ and ‘despicable’ after 2020 election
item.description: McConnell also criticized the former president as a “narcissist” and admitted after the 2020 election that “it’s not just the Democrats who are counting the days” until he left office.
item.dc:creator: Alexander Bolton, NewsNation

item.title: Harris, Trump trade insults over who is fit to serve
item.description: The question of each presidential candidate's fitness to serve has become a breeding ground for insults between Vice President Harris and former President Trump, who are trying to paint each other as incapable of being the next commander in chief.
item.dc:creator: Alex Gangitano, NewsNation

item.title: Ex-funeral home owner pleads guilty to assaulting police and journalists during Capitol riot
item.description: A former Long Island funeral home owner has pleaded guilty to spraying wasp killer at police officers and assaulting two journalists, including an Associated Press photographer, during a mob’s riot at the U.S. Capitol nearly four years ago.
item.dc:creator: Michael Kunzelman, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Comer report reveals Biden-Harris admin's 'rampant waste, fraud, abuse'
item.description: EXCLUSIVE: House Oversight Committee Chairman James Comer, R-Ky., highlighted his panel's oversight work of the Biden-Harris administration, saying Americans “cannot afford" another term of “incompetence.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Biden making quick trip to Germany before US election to discuss Ukraine and democracy with allies
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — President Joe Biden has long believed diplomacy is about personal relationships — and he'll spend Friday in Berlin with German Chancellor Olaf Scholz as his time in office is on the cusp of ending.
item.dc:creator: JOSH BOAK, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: McConnell called Trump 'stupid' and 'despicable' in private after the 2020 election, a new book says
item.description: Senate Republican leader Mitch McConnell said after the 2020 election that then-President Donald Trump was “stupid as well as being ill-tempered” and a “despicable human being.
item.dc:creator: Mary Clare Jalonick, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Israel’s UN ambassador: Response to Iran will be ‘very painful'
item.description: The world awaits Israel’s response to Iran’s missile attacks on Oct. 1, and the nation’s U.N. ambassador, Danny Danon, promised it will be "very painful" in order to deter Iran from attacking again.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Trump rips Harris on illegal immigration during Latino voter town hall: Hispanic voters 'most against it'
item.description: Former President Donald Trump joined Univison for a town hall on Wednesday in Miami to speak directly with undecided Latino voters and their top election concerns.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Trump tried a friendlier pitch with Latino voters at a Univision town hall
item.description: During a town hall outside Miami, Trump touted his record on the economy, yet called Jan. 6 a "day of love" and would not back off false claims about Haitian migrants eating pets in Springfield, Ohio.
item.dc:creator: Franco Ordoñez, MPR News

item.title: The ballot’s mailed but you die before Election Day. Now what?
item.description: Some states allow them to be counted, and some don't. But most states have never addressed the question.
item.dc:creator: Rich Johnson, NewsNation

item.title: Harris Fox News interview draws sharp reactions on both sides
item.description: “If she wins, it will be because of that answer … which is ‘I’m not Joe Biden,’” columnist Chris Cillizza noted.
item.dc:creator: Rich Johnson, NewsNation

item.title: Vance says 'no' when asked whether Trump lost 2020 election
item.description: In the months since he became Donald Trump ’s running mate, Ohio Sen. JD Vance has repeatedly deflected questions about whether the Republican presidential nominee lost the 2020 election, saying he was focused on the future.
item.dc:creator: THOMAS BEAUMONT, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Bakersfield Chamber of Commerce, DA Zimmer urge support for Prop 36
item.description: "Californians, whether they be independents, Democrats, or Republicans have had enough," said Kern County District Attorney Cynthia Zimmer.
item.dc:creator: Connor Dore, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Harris interview on Fox gets testy — but also gives her a do-over
item.description: The interview was the vice president's first formal sit-down with Fox. She faced questions on immigration, and was given a chance to answer again what she would do differently from President Biden.
item.dc:creator: Tamara Keith, MPR News

item.title: What is California's Proposition 5 on votes for bond measures?
item.description: Nearly every election cycle, Californians vote on a measures to allow local governments to borrow money in the form of bonds. Under state law, however, it is quite hard for these measures to actually pass — something that could change in November.
item.dc:creator: Danielle Dawson, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Biden to travel to Germany Thursday, delays African leg of trip
item.description: In Berlin, Biden will convene a meeting with German Chancellor Olaf Scholz to discuss continued support for Ukraine.
item.dc:creator: Tanya Noury, NewsNation

item.title: Harris, Bret Baier spar over immigration at outset of Fox News interview
item.description: Vice President Harris on Wednesday sparred at length with Fox News anchor Bret Baier over immigration in a rare sit-down with the network. Baier opened the interview by asking Harris how many immigrants had crossed the southern border during the Biden administration.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Elon Musk commits $70 million to boost Donald Trump
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Elon Musk, a tech mogul who is the world's richest person, plunged more than $70 million into helping Donald Trump and other Republicans win in November's election, making him one of the biggest donors to GOP causes this campaign season, according to campaign finance disclosures re
item.dc:creator: BRIAN SLODYSKO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trump spends big on anti-trans ads for 2024 election
item.description: Trump spends more on ads about transgender women and girls in sports and gender transitions than on Bidenomics, fracking and taxes.
item.dc:creator: Elizabeth Prann, NewsNation

item.title: Harris and Trump transition efforts reflect their different approaches to governing
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — In a drab office suite just blocks from the White House, seasoned political operatives are drawing up detailed plans for a government in waiting. Another identical suite in the same government building is dark and idle.
item.dc:creator: ZEKE MILLER and JILL COLVIN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Man arrested near Trump Coachella rally with gun sues for defamation
item.description: The man arrested near former President Trump’s Coachella, Calif., rally over the weekend sued the Riverside County sheriff for defamation and other claims, saying there were “preposterous allegations” made about the incident possibly being an assassination attempt.
item.dc:creator: Zach Schonfeld, NewsNation

item.title: The 3rd Precinct keeps showing up in the GOP playbook. Minneapolis wants to turn the page
item.description: Speaking outside the former 3rd Precinct in Minneapolis this week, Republican vice presidential candidate JD Vance criticized Gov. Tim Walz for his response to civil unrest in 2020, painting a picture of a burned-down city with rampant crime.
item.dc:creator: Estelle Timar-Wilcox, MPR News

item.title: Trump would be the oldest person to become president. He’s not sharing health details
item.description: If he wins next month’s election, Donald Trump would be the oldest person in U.S. history elected president. Yet the 78-year-old Republican nominee is refusing to disclose new details about his physical or mental well-being, breaking decades of precedent.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, MPR News

item.title: Minnesota Republican Party sues Hennepin County over election judges list
item.description: A state law requires each county in Minnesota select election judges from lists provided by the Republican and Democratic parties. A lawsuit claims Hennepin County violated state statute by not selecting judges from a GOP list.
item.dc:creator: Clay Masters, MPR News

item.title: Trump: Black and Hispanic voters who vote for Harris 'gotta have your head examined'
item.description: “Any African American or Hispanic– and you know how well I’m doing there – that votes for Kamala, you gotta have your head examined,” Trump said.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, NewsNation

item.title: In close Minn. House races, personal problems old and new can be vexing for candidates
item.description: With the Minnesota House majority hinging on a small number of seats, flaws in candidate pasts are resurfacing as parties and groups jockey for an edge that can decide key races.
item.dc:creator: Ellie Roth, MPR News

item.title: Harris' Fox interview a bigger risk for Bret Baier: Bill O'Reilly
item.description: Bill O'Reilly discusses the state of the race as Kamala Harris and Donald Trump work to energize key voter groups.
item.dc:creator: Leland Vittert, NewsNation

item.title: Question 3: 8 News Now Daily Voting Guide
item.description: Dr. Sandra Cosgrove and Kerry Durmick joined the 8 News Now Daily Voting Guide to provide a proponent and opponent's view of one of the most contentious issues on the Nevada ballot in November: Question 3.
item.dc:creator: Justin Walker, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: ISIS-K orchestrated foiled Election Day terror plot: US official
item.description: Afghan native Nasir Ahmad Tawhedi, 27, was arrested in early October and accused of planning to target people on Election Day.
item.dc:creator: Anna Kutz, NewsNation

item.title: Hennepin County achieves 'functional zero' status in ending veteran homelessness
item.description: The designation from several federal agencies indicates a community has brought down the number of veterans experiencing homelessness to a very low level and continues to sustain the effort.
item.dc:creator: Erica Zurek, MPR News

item.title: Rufus Wainwright blasts Trump playing 'Hallelujah' at town hall: 'The height of blasphemy'
item.description: The 51-year-old singer said Tuesday that he was "horrified" to learn his 2001 cover of Leonard Cohen's "Hallelujah" was part of the playlist at the Trump campaign event a night earlier.
item.dc:creator: Judy Kurtz, Fox 5

item.title: Trump clashes with Bloomberg editor over tariffs
item.description: “That is going to have a serious effect on the overall economy,” Bloomberg’s top editor, John Micklethwait said.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, NewsNation

item.title: Nevada DMV fast-tracks credentials for potential voters
item.description: The Nevada Department of Motor Vehicles is seeking to move potential voters to the front of the line starting next week and is reminding new residents they can surrender their out-of-state ID.
item.dc:creator: James Schaeffer, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Geraldo Rivera endorses Harris, says Trump 'unfit'
item.description: NewsNation correspondent-at-large Geraldo Rivera said Monday that he's endorsing Kamala Harris for president.
item.dc:creator: Liz Jassin, NewsNation

item.title: Election Day Looms: Hurricane impacts on voting
item.description: Voting rules changed for impacted Florida counties after hurricane Helene, now the question is, will rules be adjusted after hurricane Milton?
item.dc:creator: Mackenzie LaPorte, WFLA, NBC

item.title: VP hopefuls make Midwest push as Vance pops in on Minnesota, Walz swings through Wisconsin
item.description: A near-meeting on the tarmac at the Minneapolis-St. Paul airport opens the campaign week for Tim Walz and JD Vance, the vice presidential nominees on their party tickets.
item.dc:creator: Dana Ferguson and Clay Masters, MPR News
